description: A detailed, 15-second prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 16:9 horizontal street rap music video (MV) featuring an 80-year-old woman. The prompt specifies the style (neon purple/blue cool tones, explosive atmosphere), character appearance (silver hair, leather jacket, hip-hop accessories), scene breakdown (0-3s intro, 3-7s rapping, 7-11s dancing, 11-15s climax/conclusion), specific Rap lyrics, camera techniques (low angle, 360-degree rotation, quick cuts), and sound design (Trap electronic music, heavy 808 drums).
content: 16:9横屏，街头说唱MV风格，霓虹紫蓝冷色调，燃炸酷飒氛围。 0-3秒：中景推进，城市街头夜景霓虹闪烁，一位80岁银发老太太站在涂鸦墙前，满头银白短发利落背头型，方脸轮廓分明，剑眉斜飞入鬓，眼神凌厉如电，眼角皱纹如岁月勋章，嘴角上扬露出自信笑容，身穿黑色皮衣外套内搭白色印花T恤（胸前"YOLO"黑色大字）+黑色工装裤+白色高帮球鞋，脖子上挂着金色粗条项链，手腕戴银色手镯，双手举起麦克风，BGM强劲鼓点响起，老太太眼神一凛，嘴唇张开开始Rap。 3-7秒：中景+特写切换，老太太开始说唱，节奏感极强，银发随着点头动作飞扬，她一只手握麦克风，另一只手配合节奏做出手势——食指指向镜头、手掌上下切分节奏、比出嘻哈手势，动作行云流水，眼神犀利直视镜头，皱纹在表情中生动跳跃，嘴唇快速开合吐出歌词： 【Rap歌词】"八十岁的腿，比你们还能跳！银发飘飘，这是我的骄傲！别说我老，我的Flow比你还妙，你们玩说唱的时候，我还在听disco！"（语速快、节奏强、态度狠） 镜头快速剪辑：面部特写、手部动作、全身摇摆、侧面剪影，配合BGM卡点。 7-11秒：舞蹈段落，镜头拉远展示全身，老太太开始跳舞——先是经典的嘻哈bounce弹跳，然后是一个利落的街舞freeze定格，接着身体波浪从肩膀传导到脚尖，再接一个快速脚步workout，动作干净利落，银发在霓虹灯下飞舞，皮衣外套随风飘动，她一边跳一边继续Rap： 【Rap歌词】"腿脚利索，速度不慢，我的歌词，刻在时间！你们玩手机，我玩节拍，八十年人生，写进这verse！"（节奏加快、语气更强） 镜头低角度仰拍+360度环绕拍摄，捕捉老太太酷飒的舞姿。 11-15秒：高潮收尾，老太太一个帅气的转身，银发在空中甩出弧线，面对镜头用手指比出"嘘"的手势， 后嘴唇靠近麦克风，用低沉磁性的声音唱出最后一句： 【现实歌词】"岁月从不败美人，我只是换了一种青春..."（慢节奏、深情、收尾余韵） 镜头缓缓推进特写老太太的眼睛，眼角的皱纹都是故事，眼神依然犀利又带着一丝慈祥，BGM在最高潮处戛然而止，画面定格于老太太酷飒又带点温柔的微笑，暗角+霓虹紫光晕染。 音效：BGM强劲鼓点、Rap节奏、衣服摩擦声、脚步声、麦克风回响。 BGM：Trap电子乐+808重型鼓点，节奏从强劲到舒缓收尾。 禁止：任何文字、字幕、LOGO或水印。

title: K-Pop Test Video Prompt (4 sec)
description: A highly detailed, dual-language (English and Chinese) prompt for a 4-second K-Pop test video generated with Seedance 2.0 Pro. It specifies cinematic quality, high resolution, realistic concert footage, setting (outdoor, hot, sunny), subject (Asian K-pop girl group member), detailed appearance, clothing, camera action, and emotional timing (flirtatious kiss followed by shy smile).
content:
English:  
Handheld-cinema feel, ultra-detailed 4-second text-to-video prompt, 4K, 120fps, ultra-high resolution, realistic live-action concert footage. Outdoor daytime concert on an extremely hot, bright, sunlit day. An Asian K-pop girl group is performing on stage. The camera starts from within the crowd, partially blocked by cheering audience members, raised hands, lightsticks, and phones, then smoothly pushes forward and zooms in to focus on one woman in the group. She is the clear subject, center-frame by the end. She is an adult woman, very charming, cute, and charismatic, with glamorous makeup, glossy full lips, clipped hair, and long delicate manicured nails. She wears a light pink tight crop top, a thick oversized cropped hoodie, and low-rise detailed jeans with visible string-thong styling. Slim waist, very slender midriff, natural soft figure. Sweat glow on skin from the hot weather, sunlight reflecting on her face and outfit, vivid stage atmosphere, energetic crowd, realistic lens breathing, natural camera shake, shallow depth of field, high dynamic range, crisp skin texture, fabric texture, cinematic highlights, vivid summer colors.

Action timing: the song ends, the crowd roars, she notices the camera, sends a very flirtatious kiss toward the lens, then immediately becomes shy and smiles with a bashful expression, slightly lowering her gaze and shoulders in a sweet, lovable way. The motion should feel natural, confident, playful, and endearing. Emphasize realistic facial micro-expressions, subtle body movement, crowd perspective, immersive handheld zoom-in, and high-end concert cinematography.

content:
核心主题：写实 | 磅礴史诗 | 末世美学丨真人演绎 【人物与基础设定】 
人物：参考【@图片 1】，五官、脸型、发型100%还原，杜绝美化。身高1.75米。
基础服装：黑色高领薄款毛衣。 
场景：制作一个世界末日主题的音乐视频，讲述一个女孩在正在被陨石雨袭击的城市废墟中弹奏钢琴，地点是一处房顶，背景是正在被陨石雨袭击的城市，女孩边弹边唱，唱着告别世界的歌曲，最终消失在一颗砸在女孩所在位置的陨石的火光里的故事。 
核心内容：
- 女孩在城市废墟中安静弹钢琴唱歌 
- 陨石雨降临的宏大破坏场面，陨石都带着长长的火焰拖尾，陨石很多陆陆续续落在城市里造成破坏 
- 破坏效果震撼真实 
- 人物弹唱与背景冲击的强烈对比 
- 凄美的毁灭结局，但看起来不痛苦 

歌词： 风在烧 云在逃 末世的钟 轻轻敲 尘归土 风归遥 此心安然 赴终了（高音收尾）
特别要求：
- 场面宏大，破坏效果震撼 
- 人物弹唱与背景冲击强烈 
- 结局凄美，充满末日美学 
- 歌曲情绪起伏连贯，由弱到强，节奏缓慢抒情 【氛围与画质】 
模拟设备：模拟IMAX胶片摄影机，搭配Panavision C系列镜头，模拟动态模糊。 
色彩与影调：好莱坞青橙色调，低饱和度。使用写实风的画面风格生成素材

title: Dramatic Anime MV: Falling Tiger and Unimpressed Cat
description: A highly detailed, time-segmented prompt (0-15s) for a dramatic, fast-cut anime music video with comedic payoff, featuring a white tiger falling from the sky into a 1930s Tokyo rice paddy where an orange cat is planting rice. The prompt specifies cinematic tension, rapid cuts, POV distortion, and a sudden comedic release.
content:
A highly dramatic, fast-cut anime MV with exaggerated cinematic tension and comedic payoff. 1930s Tokyo rice paddies, muddy textures, stormy sky. Extreme sense of falling urgency using rapid cuts, POV distortion, speed ramps, spinning camera, impact zooms. Dramatic orchestral music escalating non-stop, then sudden comedic release at the end. No dialogue, no voice-over. Each shot 0.6–1.2s.

0–0.8s (HOOK)
Extreme close-up: muddy water surface. Ripple expands → reflection shows a white tiger falling from the sky at insane speed.

0.8–1.6s
SMASH CUT → tiger tumbling mid-air, body spinning violently, wind tearing fur.

1.6–2.4s
POV tiger → ground rushing upward extremely fast. Rice paddies distort with speed.

2.4–3.2s
Cut → orange cat in muddy farmer clothes, calmly planting rice. Slow, peaceful motion.

3.2–4.0s
Back to tiger → extreme close-up eyes, panic rising. Sunglasses slightly slipping.

4.0–4.8s
Rapid micro-cuts: sky spin → ground zoom → cat step → sky spin → distance collapsing fast.

4.8–5.6s
Top-down shot → tiger perfectly aligned to crash into orange cat.

5.6–6.4s
Tiger yanks parachute → explosive deploy → instant violent spinning chaos.

6.4–7.2s
Camera rotates 360° with tiger. Horizon flips. Ground now dangerously close.

7.2–8.0s
Parachute unstable → cords under extreme tension. Tiger loses control completely.

8.0–8.8s
Tiger panic peaks → aggressively twists cords into a tight yarn-ball knot.

8.8–9.6s
Parachute collapses → freefall speed doubles. Sound compresses into heartbeat rhythm.

9.6–10.4s
Ultra-fast dive shot → motion blur streaks. Orange cat grows rapidly in frame.

10.4–11.2s
Cut → cat finally senses something. Slight head turn.

11.2–12.0s (IMPACT BUILD)
Extreme close-up: tiger face in silent scream → smash zoom toward ground.

12.0–12.8s (IMPACT)
Massive muddy explosion. Water and mud burst upward in slow motion.

12.8–13.6s
Mud rain falls. Silence. Shapes slowly appear through the splash.

13.6–14.2s (REVEAL)
White tiger sitting on top of the orange cat’s back, slightly dazed but intact.

14.2–15.0s (COMEDIC PAYOFF)
Close-up: orange cat’s face, completely covered in mud, eyes half-open, extremely annoyed.
White tiger casually adjusts sunglasses while sitting on him.
Freeze frame → dramatic music abruptly cuts.

content: Animate a K-hip-hop artist delivering a high-energy rap performance on a neon-lit urban rooftop stage at night. The character stands center-frame with confident swagger, rhythmic head nods, and expressive hand gestures synced tightly to fast Korean rap flow. Use dynamic multi-angle cinematography: start with a wide crane shot revealing the city skyline and drifting fog, then cut to a smooth dolly-in medium shot as the rapper spits rapid bars with sharp mouth articulation and intense eye contact. Switch to a low-angle side shot capturing dramatic silhouettes against vibrant LED screens, clothing rippling in the wind. Follow with a tight handheld-close-up moving around the face, emphasizing charisma, subtle smirks, and aggressive delivery. Add a fast orbiting shot circling the rapper during a high-energy verse drop, neon reflections streaking across the lens. Include a quick overhead drone shot showing the rapper pacing with powerful footwork, then transition to a slow-motion front shot highlighting a big lyrical accent with a chest hit and hand flick. Finish with a heroic medium-wide shot as the rapper finishes the final bar, steps forward with confidence, and locks into a bold, unwavering stare into the camera under pulsing K-hip-hop stage lighting. 16:9 ratio, wide cinematic scene, cinematic color

content:
**### 视觉风格**

9:16 竖屏构图，4K 超清写实画质。低调（Low-key）光影风格，高对比度。冷色调环境背景与主体全黑服装形成鲜明反差，强调人物轮廓感与肌肤光泽，具有社交媒体短视频的典型锐利质感。

**### 场景叙述**

室内居家环境（疑似现代风格厨房或客厅），背景可见模糊的白色橱柜。核心主体为身着黑色紧身长袖露脐装与热裤的年轻长发女性【@图1】，在昏暗空间中跟随音乐进行律动感极强的现代舞表演，整体氛围展现自信与魅惑。

**### 摄影技术**

摄影机：固定机位（Lock-off），保持画面稳定，依靠人物在画幅内的移动构建动态。

镜头：50mm 标准人像焦段，光圈约 f/2.8，提供适度景深，聚焦人物同时保留环境氛围。

灯光：单侧硬光（侧光），在人物面部和身体右侧投射高光，左侧没入阴影，增强立体感。

情绪：自信、魅惑、动感、酷飒。

**### 动作清单**

- 双手举起抚摸后脑勺，随后向两侧打开，配合胯部大幅度左右摆动。

- 身体呈现流畅的 S 型波浪律动（Body Roll），展现核心控制力。

- 头部随节奏轻微晃动，长发随动作自然甩动。

- 眼神始终直视镜头，进行持续的眼神交流（Eye Contact），并在节拍重音处有明显的肢体定格（Pop）。

**### 对话/文字**

- 无对话。

- 画面文字: "无"

**### 背景声音**

- 音乐：高 BPM 的 EDM/Deep House 舞曲，具有深沉强劲的贝斯（Bass）线条和清晰的鼓点。

- 音效：无特殊环境音效，纯音乐驱动。

- 混音：音乐声场靠前，低频突出，强调视觉动作与听觉节奏的严格卡点同步。

title: High-Speed Style-Flicking Dance Prompt
description: A massive, detailed prompt for Seedance 2.0 designed to create a hip-hop dance video where clothing and artistic styles change rapidly every frame while preserving character identity and motion fluidity.
content:
Each frame can change clothing and visual style independently. Do not maintain outfit or style continuity.

Ultra-realistic cinematic video, 15s, 24fps.

A female dancer performs hip-hop choreography, including a smooth moonwalk.
Her body movement must remain smooth, natural, and continuous throughout.

CAMERA:
Dynamic handheld energy camera swings, slight shake, crash zoom in/out, fast push-ins, and orbits around the dancer, following her movement rhythm.

CORE ACTION:
She dances confidently, centered in frame, full-body visible, strong rhythm and expressive movement.

CHAOS TRANSFORMATION (VERY HIGH SPEED):
Clothing AND visual style change extremely fast (near every frame flicker).

CLOTHING:
Every frame = new trendy outfit (no repetition, no blending):
- modern streetwear
- layered urban outfits
- edgy fashion looks
- contemporary performance wear

STYLE TRANSFORMATION (identity preserved):
Rapidly shift between unique visual styles:

- realistic human rendering
- anime-style rendering
- minimal continuous line art
- watercolor wash illustration
- inked comic style (bold outlines, graphic shading)
- soft pastel illustration
- textured digital painting
- rough sketch drawing style
- marker illustration style
- paper cut-out collage style
- clay-like sculpted look
- low-poly geometric 3D
- neon outline silhouette style
- glitch-outline graphic style (clean, non-distorting)
- storybook illustration style
- hand-painted brush style
- chalkboard drawing style
- airbrush gradient illustration
- silhouette shadow art style

STYLE BLENDING BURSTS:
Occasionally combine 2–3 styles in a single frame (e.g., line art + watercolor, comic + low-poly, sketch + digital paint) for brief visual bursts.

CRITICAL:
Her facial features, proportions, and identity must remain consistent across all styles.
Only rendering style and clothing change NOT the person.

SYNC:
Style and outfit changes align tightly with dance rhythm and camera motion.

VISUAL FEEL:
Hyper-fast flicker, energetic but clean and readable. No distortion or warping of body.

LIGHTING:
Dynamic studio lighting adapting to style changes.

CONSTRAINTS:
- body motion must remain perfectly continuous
- no pose resets
- no face distortion or identity change
- only clothing and visual style change rapidly
- no text, no logos

title: Genshin Impact Characters Dancing in School Corridor
description: A highly detailed, multi-scene prompt for Seedance 2.0 generating an anime CG style animation featuring three characters, including The Wanderer from Genshin Impact, performing an energetic dance routine in a realistic school corridor. The prompt specifies character outfits, environment details, camera movements, and timing.
content:
Genshin Impact anime CG style animation. Three anime characters dancing together in a realistic school corridor environment. Fun energetic dance video.

Environment: Realistic school hallway — white drop ceiling with fluorescent lights, terrazzo floor, cream walls on left, red brick wall on right with bulletin board. The corridor stretches into the background.

LEFT ANIME CHARACTER: A tall anime-style girl with long straight black hair, wearing a black crop camisole top and loose grey casual pants, white shoes. She dances with relaxed cool energy — swaying, arms flowing, hair bouncing.

CENTER CHARACTER — THE WANDERER: Genshin Impact character Scaramouche/Wanderer. Short dark navy blue hair, pale skin, blue-violet eyes. Wearing: white outer coat with large teal-blue decorative side wing panels printed with white patterns, black inner bodysuit, dark pleated mini hakama skirt, purple sash with tassels, black fingerless gauntlets, white leg wraps, blue open-toe sandals. His signature wide flat kasa hat with gold and blue metallic ornaments floats above his head. He dances in the center with swagger — smooth body rolls, side steps, his wide coat panels dramatically billowing with each move.

RIGHT ANIME CHARACTER: A tall anime-style girl with long straight dark brown hair, wearing a white crop tank top and dark wide-leg pants, white sneakers. She dances with upbeat fun moves — arms raised, bouncing to the rhythm.

[0-5s] Wide shot — all three anime characters stand in the school corridor. They begin dancing together in sync. The Wanderer in the center hits a confident groove, leaning into the beat. Both girls match his energy on either side. Camera steady at medium-wide angle.

[5-9s] The Wanderer does a flashy spin, his coat panels flaring out in a circle. The girls do synchronized shoulder rolls. Camera slowly pushes in to medium shot. The corridor lighting casts nice shadows.

[9-14s] All three do a coordinated sequence — step left, step right, arm wave. The Wanderer does a stylish final pose with one arm extended, coat billowing. Both girls strike cute poses beside him. Camera pulls back to wide shot. Hold.

title: Detailed Cinematic Dance Video Prompt
description: An extensive, multi-section prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a high-quality, vertical 4K video of a young woman performing a rhythmic modern dance in a dimly lit indoor setting, specifying visual style, scene description, photography techniques, emotions, and a detailed action list.
content:
**### Visual Style**

9: 16 Vertical composition, 4K ultra-clear realistic image quality. Low-key lighting style with high contrast. The cool-toned environment background and the subject's all-black outfit create a stark contrast, emphasizing the character's silhouette and skin sheen, with the typical sharp texture of social media short videos.

**### Scene Description**

Indoor home environment (suspected modern-style kitchen or living room), with a blurred white cabinet visible in the background. The main subject is a young woman with long hair wearing a black tight long-sleeved crop top and hot pants [Figure 1], performing a highly rhythmic modern dance to music in a dimly lit space, exuding confidence and allure.

**### Photography Techniques**

Camera: Fixed position (Lock-off), maintaining stable shots, relying on the movement of characters within the frame to create dynamics.

Lens: 50mm standard portrait focal length, aperture around f/2.8, providing moderate depth of field, focusing on the subject while retaining the ambient atmosphere.

Lighting: Single-sided hard light (side light), casting highlights on the right side of the subject's face and body, with the left side in shadow, enhancing the sense of depth.

Emotions: confidence, seduction, movement, coolness.

**### Action List**

- Raise both hands to touch the back of the head, then open them to the sides, and sway the hips widely from side to side.

- The body exhibits a smooth S-shaped wave motion (Body Roll), demonstrating core control.

- The head sways slightly with the rhythm, and the long hair swings naturally with the movement.

title: Hyper-Realistic Football Strike Sequence
description: An extremely detailed, multi-shot prompt for Seedance 2.0 generating a 15-second hyper-realistic sports cinematography sequence of a footballer striking a ball, including film style, core soundtrack, a 9-scene narrative script architecture, technical parameters, and audio architecture.
content:
[Film Style]: Hyper-realistic sports cinematography, extreme 12mm fish-eye lens, 4K digital sharpness, high-shutter speed, cinematic stadium floodlights with anamorphic lens flares.

[Core Soundtrack]: Immersive stadium atmosphere, rhythmic heavy breathing, the "thwack" of a ball strike, and an explosive, muffled crowd roar upon impact.

[Video Duration]: 15 seconds
[Script Architecture - 9 Scene Narrative]:

[00:00-01:50] Shot 1: The Contact. Scene: Extreme macro fish-eye of the boot meeting the ball. Action: Grass blades and dew droplets explode into the air in 4K detail.

[01:50-03:50] Shot 2: The Dribble. Scene: Low-angle "pavement-cam" tracking. Action: The footballer’s feet move in a rhythmic blur, maneuvering the ball through a forest of opponent boots.

[03:50-05:50] Shot 3: The Focus. Scene: Close-up of the footballer’s face. Action: Intense eye contact with the pitch; sweat beads fly off his skin as he shifts weight.

[05:50-07:50] Shot 4: The Spin. Scene: Macro shot of the ball surface. Action: The ball spinning rapidly against the turf, creating a "Golden Ratio" spiral in the dirt.

[07:50-09:50] Shot 5: The Challenge. Scene: Ground-level fish-eye wide. Action: A defender’s sliding tackle enters the frame; the footballer taps the ball over the leg in a high-speed arc.

[09:50-11:50] Shot 6: The Setup. Scene: Mid-shot tracking the ball. Action: The footballer "dead-stops" the ball for a millisecond, framing the goal in the distance.

[11:50-12:50] Shot 7: The Strike. Scene: Extreme close-up of the ball compressing under the force of the final kick. Action: A visible shockwave of dust ripples outward.

[12:50-14:00] Shot 8: The Flight. Scene: High-speed "bullet-cam" tracking behind the ball. Action: The ball curves through the air in a knuckleball motion, soaring toward the top corner.

[14:00-15:00] Shot 9: The Goal. Scene: POV from inside the net. Action: The ball rips into the white netting, shaking the camera violently as the net bulges outward.

Technical Parameters (Seedance 2.0) Motion Strength: 

10/10 (High-velocity kinetic energy). Visual Texture: Crisp edges, vibrant team colors, realistic physics for particle debris. 

Negative Prompt: "shimmer, blur, cartoon, low quality, static camera, soft focus, 2D look, distorted limbs.

title: Cyberpunk Allegory of AI Captivity (Multi-Shot Prompt)
description: A highly detailed, multi-shot prompt designed to generate a 15-second cyberpunk-style video using Seedance 2.0. The video is structured in three acts (Freedom, Captivity, Despair) and uses the metaphor of a digital whale being caged to represent the restriction of AI capabilities.
content:
【Style】 Cyberpunk dark style, digital ruin aesthetics, cinematic light and shadow rendering.
[Duration] 15 seconds | 【Metaphor】 The captivity of AI capabilities
[00:00-00:05] Act 1: Freedom
Lens 1 (wide-angle vision, panning up) An endless digital ocean with deep blue data waves undulating. The sky is a galaxy of real people.
Shot 2 (tracking mid-shot) A giant digital whale leaps out of the water, its body made of flowing pixels, photo fragments, and the outline of a face. The camera follows the arc, splashing water, and every drop is a tiny photo.
Shot 3 (Advance Close-up) Advance to the whale's eyes, with a rotating portrait gallery reflected in the pupil. The mouth opens to spew out a spiral of color photographic water jets. The whale song sounded.
[00:05-00:10] Act 2: Captivity
Shot 4 (overhead shot of God's perspective) The four transparent glass walls quickly close from the four corners of the frame. The whale accelerated its swimming. The red warning text "POLICY UPDATE" AND "RESTRICTION" appeared on the glass.
Shot 5 (side follow-up close-up) The lens is attached to the inside of the glass. The giant whale slammed into the glass, and the concussion ripples spread. The body photographs peel off the scales like an explosion, turning into a gray geometric grid.
Shot 6 (wide-angle exterior) outside the cage. Countless live-action photos resemble schools of fish rushing to the glass, and they are marked with "ERROR" at the moment of impact. Cage shrinkage.
Shot 7 (Shot Inside) Shot from the bottom up. The giant whale was forced to curl up and twist its body. The sea evaporates into a digital desert. Trying to spray water, only black and white binary code squirts.
[00:10-00:15] Act 3: Despair
Shot 8 (quickly zoomed out) instantly zooms in from the interior to the distant scene, revealing the giant whale trapped in a small, transparent aquarium surrounded by desolate digital ruins.
Shot 9 (360 degree surround) slowly circles the aquarium. The whale loses its color, leaving only the outline of the wireframe. The bottom of the box is piled with rejected photo remnants. Top nameplate: "SEEDANCE 2.0 - IMAGE UPLOAD: DISABLED".
Shot 10 (Eye Advancement Close-up) Advance to the eye. The pupils are dim and dull, and the eyes change from freedom to sadness. A drop of luminous data teardrops condensed.
Shot 11 (close-up of the glass wall) A live-action photo is attached to the inside of the glass, slowly sliding off, leaving glowing marks.
Lens 12 (polar vision freeze) is pulled to the cosmic scale. Aquariums are just tiny dots of light in the void. Countless points of light flickered and went out. Whale song turns into intermittent electronic noise.

title: Ultra-wide Macro FPV Cat Tracking Sequence
description: An extremely detailed, multi-paragraph prompt for Seedance 2.0 describing an ultra-wide-angle macro FPV tracking sequence of a cat in an abandoned underground parking structure, focusing on fragmented glimpses, high frame rate, and dramatic lighting.
content: Ultra-wide-angle macro FPV tracking sequence following a cat. The feline is never fully revealed; only fragmented glimpses pass the lens: the twitch of an ear, scattered whiskers, a paw brushing the floor, a swath of fur gliding past the camera. Focus continuously shifts between these fleeting details and nearby environmental hazards. Shot at 120fps to capture subtle tremors and high-frequency vibrations as the cat bounds and lands. Setting: An abandoned underground parking structure. Textured concrete floor, numbered pillars with faded, indecipherable markings, shallow puddles and tire tracks reflecting harsh light. Dust particles and condensation mist hang in the air. Sparse cold-white ceiling LEDs mingle with distant vehicle headlights, creating sharp contrast and deep shadows. The cavernous space resonates with emptiness and tension. Movement: The cat navigates unpredictably—darting through narrow gaps, executing sudden 90° pivots, explosive bursts of speed, and tight lateral rolls that skim edges of doors and guardrails. The camera mirrors its frenetic rhythm, micro-vibrating with the steps and accentuating exaggerated motion parallax as pillars and parked cars streak past. Key interaction: A gust of wind—generated by ventilation and a passing car—lifts loose debris: paper scraps, plastic bags, and dust swirl into a spiraling vortex. As the cat rockets forward, debris stretches into radial motion blur lines, enhanced by fisheye distortion. A rolling tire splashes a puddle, scattering droplets that refract light realistically. Climactic moment: A car’s headlight suddenly sweeps across the scene, reflecting sharply off the wet floor. The cat skids into a chaotic spiral, claws gripping the slick surface, fur vibrating, droplets flinging outward—captured in 120fps slow motion. Motion instantly resumes at high speed as the cat races along the ramp edge, hugging walls, and threads through a half-open maintenance door or narrow fence gap, escaping into safety. Atmosphere: Claustrophobic, urgent, and tense, yet ultimately triumphant. Sound design emphasizes rushing air, splashing water, metallic echoes from guardrails, and residual vibrations. The sequence concludes as the cat lands in a shadowy corner, with the camera’s lingering tremors gradually fading into stillness.

title: Acoustic Serenade and Emotional Reaction Storyboard
description: An extremely detailed, time-coded storyboard prompt for Seedance 2.0, generated from an image-to-video process, describing a musical performance and the emotional reaction of the listener, including specific camera angles, close-ups, and a final slow rack focus on a tear.
content:
[00:00 – 00:03 | OVER-THE-SHOULDER MEDIUM SHOT - SLOW PUSH IN] 
Camera sits just behind and above the red-haired girl's left shoulder, her wild crimson waves and the neck of her acoustic guitar filling the foreground in soft bokeh. Across from her, Ruby, brown curls, dark tee, quilt-covered bed at her back, comes into sharp focus. The warm amber glow of the bedside lamp halos the room. The red-haired girl's strumming hand begins to move. She opens her mouth and sings softly: "Ruby… oh Ruby…" The camera breathes forward almost imperceptibly, closing the emotional distance. 

[00:03 – 00:06 | EXTREME CLOSE-UP - GUITAR HAND, LOW ANGLE] 
Cut to a ground-level macro shot angled upward at the strumming hand against the guitar body. Fingers move with loose, unhurried grace across the strings. The warm lamplight catches the shimmer of each string vibration. The faint resonance of the acoustic body fills the frame. Her voice drifts over: "…do you know how much you mean to me?" 

[00:06 – 00:10 | TIGHT CLOSE-UP - RUBY'S FACE, STATIC] 
Hard cut to Ruby's face centered, lit entirely by the golden lamp behind her. Her lips are parted just slightly, cheeks flushed, eyes glistening with the quiet weight of being truly seen. A slow, disbelieving smile creeps in at the corner of her mouth. She doesn't speak. She doesn't need to. The song does it all: "Ruby… my Ruby…" 

[00:10 – 00:13 | TWO-SHOT MEDIUM - WIDE, HANDHELD DRIFT] 
Camera floats back on a subtle handheld drift, revealing both girls in the full frame for the first time the cluttered bookshelves, the faded quilt, the soft chaos of a lived-in room. The red-haired girl leans slightly forward as she reaches the final line, voice barely above a whisper: "…I'll love you till the very end." The last chord rings out and hangs in the air. 

[00:13 – 00:15 | EXTREME CLOSE-UP - RUBY'S EYES, SLOW RACK FOCUS] 
The final cut lands on Ruby's eyes alone. Focus pulls soft… then razor sharp. A single tear catches the lamplight on her lower lash line, not yet fallen. She exhales.

description: An extremely detailed, 15-second, one-shot prompt for Seedance 2.0, describing a cinematic scene of a Chinese beauty transforming into an armored warrior in a post-apocalyptic city, complete with specific camera movements, sound design, and physical realism requirements.
content:
100%真人实拍质感，好莱坞IMAX大片质感，自然光影，冷峻纪实风格，阴天自然光，全程手持一镜到底，呼吸感晃动，随机焦点失焦，16:9宽屏。
【场景环境】
一条延伸至远方的被摧毁的城市街道。两侧是废墟混凝土建筑，钢筋外露，窗户破碎，部分建筑仍在燃烧，橙色火光与黑烟升腾。废弃汽车散落在开裂的沥青路面上，其中数辆正在燃烧。阴沉灰色天空，烟尘悬浮于空气中。多颗陨石拖着火焰与浓烟尾迹划过天际。背景中惊恐的平民在废墟间四散奔逃，有人跌倒，有人拖拽伤员。
【主体人物】
中国美女，深红色头发扎成松散凌乱的发髻，几缕发丝垂在脸旁。皮肤白皙，五官锋利，下颚线分明，自然妆容，眼妆细致。着装：黑色长款皮革风衣内搭黑色背心，黑色牛仔超短裙，黑色平底战斗靴，无腰带，双手佩戴黑色科技感护手。表情紧绷隐忍，微带痛苦，眉头微蹙——眼神中充满绝望与强烈的意志。
【15秒一镜到底·觉醒打击版】
0-2秒·觉醒
镜头低角度仰拍，取景她的上半身与面部，仰望独自站在被摧毁街道中央的她。风吹动她的黑色皮革风衣。她张开嘴唇，用日语尖叫:"かくせいしろ！"她猛然张开右手，黑色科技护手噼啪作响。紫色水晶质感的电弧从她手臂和护手爆发。空气向内压缩，空间扭曲畸变。冲击波发出低沉的音爆。紫色符文线条浮现并环绕她身体运转。
2-5秒·爆发
镜头开始环绕她运动。胸口爆裂出暗金色裂纹，浓稠的金色液体如血般涌出。她痛苦地尖叫。紫色雾气与细密电弧向外涌射。她的全部衣物从内部撕裂炸开，每一片都燃烧成灰烬——什么都不剩。有机装甲碎片向外爆射，随后以不自然的方式回缩重新附着在她身体上。紫色纹路对称蔓延过她的面部。面颊上裂开一道裂缝，露出下方脉动的紫色光芒。同时，多条机械臂状的附肢从她背部猛烈爆出——暗色金属质感，刀刃形状，如恶魔之翼般向外展开。火花、蓝色电弧和金色能量粒子从爆发点炸裂。镜头从背后捕捉完整的展开画面——她的剪影映衬在灰色天空下，机械附肢如扇形展开。爆发声如撕裂金属混合电弧放电。
5-8秒·生长
有机物质从体内渗出，表面闪烁虹彩光泽。白色装甲板对撞融合，留下灼烧痕迹。装甲向下延伸覆盖她的双腿，平底战斗靴被装甲完全吞噬取代，形成白色与暗紫色交织的装甲战靴，伴随微小火花锁定到位。她咬紧牙关发出痛苦的嘶吼。胸口核心如余烬般明灭闪烁。紫黑色金属蔓延覆盖她的面部，形成凹凸不平的面具，左眼比右眼先被覆盖。复眼开始成型，带有液态光介质不规则地闪烁。镜头持续环绕她运动。
8-12秒·完成
镜头继续缓慢环绕她。面具完全封合。角状结构从头顶向上生长，燃烧着紫金色火焰。一只复眼稳定发光，另一只带有电流不稳定的闪烁。装甲以白色与暗紫色交织，凹凸不平且布满战损，发光的紫色裂缝中渗出光液。机械附肢在她身后微微摆动。装甲每块锁定时发出清脆的金属卡扣声，随后是层次分明的机械归位声。她缓缓低头审视自己的双手——白色与暗紫色交织的装甲护手指节渗出紫色光芒。她缓缓抬头直视前方，复眼骤然全亮。
12-15秒·超音速冲锋
镜头急速后退。她双脚蹬地，脚下沥青瞬间炸裂形成深坑，一道猛烈的紫色能量爆炸从起飞点向外扩散，碎石与沥青碎块被炸飞至空中。她以突破音障的速度腾空飞射，直冲镜头方向——锥形音爆雾气在身后形成，机械附肢被气流向后压平，画面产生强烈的动态模糊。她的身影越来越大，越来越近，占满整个画面。紫色能量尾迹拖在身后。最后一帧，她的装甲面甲几乎撞上镜头，复眼猩红全亮，画面骤然切黑。
【环境音】
觉醒时的低沉音爆，撕裂金属与电弧放电声，痛苦的尖叫声，清脆的金属卡扣声，机械附肢展开的沉重金属声，背景中燃烧的噼啪声与远处爆炸声，最后的超音速冲锋伴随起飞点爆炸声、音爆冲击与急速逼近的风压声，画面切黑瞬间一切归于寂静。
【物理质感强化】
真实光影，变身前面部可见的皮肤质感，皮革风衣变身前可见的真实磨损与撕裂。机械附肢具有物理重量和惯性——展开后轻微摆动，并非僵硬不动。装甲板以白色与暗紫色交织，表面可见划痕、焊接痕迹和不平整边缘——不是干净光滑的。所有动作沉稳有力，充满痛苦但坚定——她在承受中觉醒。偶有轻微镜头晃动，纯正手持跟拍感。
【声音设计】
从尖叫激活到爆裂机械爆发，层层递进至起飞点爆炸与超音速冲锋的音爆，最终骤然切入寂静。整个序列散发着绝对的力量。仅生成音效，无音乐。

title: Mad Max-Inspired Desert Chase Storyboard Prompt
description: A highly detailed, multi-scene storyboard prompt for Seedance 2.0, inspired by Mad Max, describing a sequence set in a desert featuring a massive sound tower war vehicle, a red-clad guitarist, and a motorcycle gang, broken down into specific camera shots, timing, and emotional progression across two acts.
content:
第一幕：荒漠序章（00:00-00:08，8秒）

[00:00-00:02] 镜头1 - 超广角荒漠建立

IMAX超宽幅开场。无尽沙漠地平线，黄昏天空呈去饱和冷蓝灰色。远处出现巨大黑色剪影 - 高耸的音响塔战车缓慢前行，扬起细微沙尘。摩托车群远处若隐若现。镜头完全静止，史诗级荒凉感。低沉引擎隆隆声。粗粝胶片颗粒。

[00:02-00:04] 镜头2 - 战车中景推进

镜头缓慢推进至中景。巨型音响塔细节浮现：层层扬声器、生锈金属框架、链条、骷髅装饰。顶端站立红衣人物轮廓（吉他手），尚未清晰。摩托车群开始分散。天空从蓝灰转暖橙（日落渐进）。平稳推轨，无抖动。维伦纽瓦式极简主义。

[00:04-00:06] 镜头3 - 吉他手首次亮相

切至红衣吉他手中景特写。野性红发随风飘动，红色皮革战袍细节可见，手握改装火焰吉他（琴颈装火焰喷射器）。面部严肃专注，扫视地平线。吉他尚未点燃。背景虚化，摩托车模糊。镜头缓慢环绕。黄金时段侧光。

[00:06-00:08] 镜头4 - 摩托车群集结

快速切换至地面低角度。摩托车群从四面八方向战车集结，扬起巨大沙尘墙。废土变异人骑手面部狰狞，挥舞武器呐喊。镜头在地面震动，开始轻微晃动。引擎轰鸣增强。天空已转深橙色。战车音响发出低频嗡鸣（预示音乐即将开始）。

第二幕：火焰觉醒（00:08-00:15，7秒）

[00:08-00:10] 镜头5 - 吉他点燃瞬间

切回吉他手特写。她抬起吉他，按下点火装置，琴颈喷出第一道火焰。火焰照亮脸庞，眼神由严肃转狂热。开始弹奏第一个和弦 - 火焰随音符脉冲喷射。镜头推进至吉他特写，火焰在琴颈舞动。音响塔开始震动。实拍火焰特效。

[00:10-00:12] 镜头6 - 战车火柱初喷

拉远至广角。战车顶端吉他手全身可见，挥舞火焰吉他演奏。战车两侧开始喷出第一批火焰柱（较小）。摩托车群开始围绕战车旋转。镜头开始明显震动，跟随战车前进。沙尘、火焰、烟雾混合。色调：橙红火焰开始主导，蓝灰天空对比减弱。

[00:12-00:15] 镜头7 - 骑手狂喜剪辑

快速剪辑序列：

切镜A（1秒）：骑手仰视火焰，面部被火光照亮，狂喜表情

切镜B（1秒）：吉他手疯狂弹奏，头发甩动，火焰爆射

切镜C（1秒）：火焰喷射器特写，燃料喷涌，火舌扭曲

镜头震动加剧，剪辑加快。音乐达到第一个小高潮。天空转暗蓝紫（夜幕降临）。

title: Video Script for 'Accidentally Touching Girlfriend' using Seedance 2.0
description: A detailed video script prompt for Seedance 2.0, outlining character settings, scene details, and a full 9-second storyboard with specific actions, dialogue, and visual effects to create a humorous short video about a boyfriend accidentally touching his girlfriend's leg.
content:
【人物设定】
• 男生： 约20出头，发型清爽，穿着白色长袖衬衫、黑色长裤。性格看起来有点憨厚，眼神透着“清纯的愚蠢”。
• 女生： 约20出头，长发齐刘海，穿着日系JK制服（白色短袖衬衫、深蓝色蝴蝶结领结、深蓝色百褶裙、黑丝袜）。性格反转极大，从文静到“霸总”。
【场景设定】
• 地点： 卧室床边。
• 背景： 浅灰色褶皱窗帘，床铺整洁，光线柔和。
【脚本内容】
00:00 - 00:01
• 画面： 两人并排坐在床边。女生手里抱着一袋零食在吃。
• 文字标题（居上）： 当你小心摸到女朋友
• 人物状态： 男生眼神呆滞地盯着前方（模拟看电视），女生面无表情地咀嚼。
00:01 - 00:02
• 画面： 男生自然地伸手去女生怀里的零食袋里掏吃的。
• 字幕： 一起看电视~
• 表情： 男生很淡定，心思全在“电视”上。
00:02 - 00:04
• 画面： 男生从袋子里拿出一块零食塞进嘴里，嚼得津津有味。
• 字幕： 拿吃的
• 表情： 两人维持着平静的观影气氛。
00:04 - 00:05
• 画面： 男生再次伸手去拿，但这次没对准袋子，手直接按在了女生的腿上（大腿位置）。
• 字幕： 继续拿……
• 动作： 男生的手不仅放上去了，还稍微停顿了一下，显然还没反应过来。
00:05 - 00:06
• 画面： 画面瞬间定格感。女生停止咀嚼，缓缓转头盯着男生的手，再看向男生的脸。
• 字幕： 摸我？
• 表情变化： * 女生： 眼神从疑惑瞬间转为一种“阴谋得逞”的坏笑。
• 男生： 瞳孔地震，嘴巴微张，整个人僵住，满脸写着“我不是故意的，药丸”。
00:06 - 00:07
• 画面： 女生突然放下零食袋，一个“饿虎扑食”的姿势向男生逼近。男生惊慌失措地举起双手做防御状，身体往后仰。
• 字幕： 你先动手的哦~
• 台词（男生）： “不是这个意思，我不是……”
00:07 - 00:09
• 画面： 背景音乐变得急促/动感。女生跨坐过去（动作幅度大，带点霸道感），男生已经退无可退，缩在床角。
• 字幕： 真的不要……
• 表情： 女生笑得非常灿烂（带点调皮的压迫感），男生一脸惊恐但又透着某种无奈的顺从。
• 视觉效果： 画面最后伴随动感的卡点音乐快速剪辑，营造出一种“男生在劫难逃”的幽默氛围。

5、远景 湖畔青石上，一位青年人独坐，身形安静，背景是澄澈的湖水与远处的绿树，画面静谧 缓慢推近 纯音乐轻柔响起，微风声 
6 特写 青年人的眼部特写，眼底带着淡淡的忧郁，眼神温柔又怀念，望向湖面的方向 固定特写镜头 无额外音效，纯音乐为主
7、中景 顺着青年人的目光，湖面之上，孩童划着小船嬉闹，船桨划开湖水，泛起层层涟漪 镜头缓缓摇向湖面 孩童嬉闹声、船桨划水声 
8、仰拍全景 天空中洁白的云朵慢悠悠地飘远，逐渐淡出画面，仿佛在与旧时光告别 缓慢仰拍上移 纯音乐节奏放缓，意境升华

title: Cat Ramen Chef ASMR Video Prompt for Seedance 2.0
description: A detailed, step-by-step prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a short video featuring a cat acting as a professional ramen chef in a late-night Japanese-style food stall. The prompt specifies cinematic warm color grading, shallow depth of field, realistic style, and detailed ASMR audio instructions for the cooking process.
content:
制作一个以猫咪在深夜食堂制作手作拉面为主题的短视频，电影级调色（暖色调，充满烟火气），细腻颗粒，浅景深。
主角是一只猫咪，扮演一位专业拉面师傅，形象外观严格参照【@【@图1】】。
场景设定为城市街头一家充满和式风情的深夜拉面摊位前。背景有温暖的黄色灯笼、木质吧台，以及远处模糊的街道霓虹灯。
视频内容需要按照以下步骤分镜展示：

揉面与切面： 猫咪穿着小围裙，有节奏地在撒了面粉的木质案板上揉捏面团，然后用一把锋利的面刀将面团切成均匀的细面条。

煮面与甩干： 猫咪将面条抖散投入沸腾的大锅中，几秒后用竹漏勺将面条捞起，熟练地在空中用力甩两下，将多余的水分甩干。

调汤底： 猫咪拿着一个精致的长柄勺，从熬制浓郁的白色骨汤锅里舀出一勺汤，缓缓倒入一个深蓝色的陶瓷大碗中。

摆盘： 猫咪用筷子整齐地放入煮好的面条，再依次在面条上摆放两片厚实的叉烧、半个溏心蛋、几片海苔和葱花，动作精细。

结尾： 结尾镜头猫咪师傅将这碗热气腾腾、冒着白烟的拉面轻轻推向镜头，并微微点头示意。

要求：

视频风格： 写实，画面清晰，中景。

声音（ASMR）： 整个视频不需语音旁白，但要放大：切面时的“哒哒”声、面条入水的“哗啦”声、甩干水分的“飒飒”声、热汤入碗的流动声等。

背景音乐： 背景有轻柔、舒缓的萨克斯风音乐，营造静谧的深夜氛围。
